headline: Robinhood Stock Rises as It Adds to Wave of Mass Tech Layoffs
summary: Robinhood Markets  stock was gaining early Tuesday after the trading platform said it would cut around a tenth of its employees.  Robinhood said it would cut about 10% of its full-time employees and close a small number of open roles.  Its shares were up 3.4% in premarket trading.
